runesv3.summonerSpellExplanation: You can take <ScSummonerInline summonerIdentifier="Teleport" /> <ScSummonerInline summonerIdentifier="Ignite" /> in harder volatile matchups or <ScSummonerInline summonerIdentifier="Flash" /> <ScSummonerInline summonerIdentifier="Teleport" /> if you win easily.

Yw2nFs9dBc.insight:
Camille wants to rush as fast as possible, so she needs to be greedy with her economy. is one of the best runes for reaching your powerspikes while spending efficiently.

  • The 300 gold saved accelerates your timing significantly
  • The +10 bonus movement speed on completed boots is a nice bonus for a champion that loves to roam

Qh5vJk1eMx.insight:
Camille's strength truly begins when she purchases , but until then she needs help surviving lane. and are perfect sustain options to get you through the early game.

  • helps you recover from poke and short trades
  • provides clutch healing and mana to stay in lane longer

Kp3mRt7xLa.insight:
Camille trades around her and passive shield cooldowns, both of which are on the longer side. is perfect for bridging the cooldown gap, giving you consistent trade tools even when your main abilities are down.

*
  • ensures you get extra value every time you proc your passive shield
  • Use short Grasp trades to stay healthy while waiting for your main cooldowns

content.content:
The great thing about Camille is that her build is mostly solved. Her first 2 items never change, and her fourth and fifth items are pretty much always going to be <ScItemInline itemName="Sterak's Gage" /> and <ScItemInline itemName="Death's Dance" />.

The order you buy these items in depends on the enemy team comp. If the enemy has mostly AP threats, then <ScItemInline itemName="Death's Dance" /> is worse than <ScItemInline itemName="Sterak's Gage" /> since it doesn't provide health like <ScItemInline itemName="Sterak's Gage" /> does. It also has the added benefit of 20% tenacity, which is a strong failsafe in case you mess up your <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey="E" /> or <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey="R" /> timings to dodge abilities.

The shield from <ScItemInline itemName="Sterak's Gage" /> also synergizes with <ScItemInline itemName="Death's Dance" />'s damage mitigation passive, allowing Camille to absorb more damage and survive longer in teamfights.

shield also synergizes with damage mitigation passive, allowing Camille to absorb more damage and survive longer in teamfights.

insights.title: Absorb, Then Heal Back
insights.reason: <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey="W" /> deals a ton of damage with very low risk. You always want to aim to land the ==outer portion== of the cone because it deals bonus ==6-8% max HP damage==, but can deal even more when you have AD since it scales.\n* The cooldown is pretty long. Use the ==movespeed== from your <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey="Q" /> to match your opponent's movements and hit them with the outer half.\n* You heal for ==100%== of the % max hp damage you deal with the outer cone - so this ability is best used when you're **not** at full health. You would want to trade first with <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey="Q" />, get your passive shield off, and then <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey="W" /> as they try to back off to get some more health back. This is how <ScChampionInline championId="Camille" /> wins lane - ==absorb damage with your passive==, and ==heal it back== with your <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey="W" />.

itemGroups.insight: <ScItemInline itemName="Trinity Force" /> Rush for insane <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey="Q" /> damage, haste, and health.\n<ScItemInline itemName="Plated Steelcaps" /> to help you win 1v1s and skirmishes.\n<ScItemInline itemName="Ravenous Hydra" /> for lifesteal and waveclear.
itemGroups.title: Core Build
Fourth Item Options
itemGroups.insight: <ScItemInline itemName="Death's Dance" /> for dmg mitigation + AD dmg if enemy AP threats aren't fed.\n<ScItemInline itemName="Sterak's Gage" /> for survivability and tenacity.\n<ScItemInline itemName="Spear of Shojin" /> for bonus damage on abilities if you're super ahead and won't die.

itemGroups.title: Fifth Item Options
itemGroups.insight: <ScItemInline itemName="Death's Dance" /> if you haven't bought it yet and want more damage + survivability.\n<ScItemInline itemName="Sterak's Gage" /> if you haven't bought it yet and need tenacity.

<ScItemInline itemName="Guardian Angel" /> for better dive and teamfight disruption using the revive.\n<ScItemInline itemName="Spear of Shojin" /> for increased damage on abilities, including true damage on <ScAbilityInline_v2 spellKey="Q" />
